offer: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual batching causes late payments and cash flow gaps. We automate the batching and delivery instead of manual batching and emailing of invoices.
problem: Manual invoice batching and delivery is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about invoicing
DM outreach to small accounting firms with demo
Share insights in accounting forums and groups
try_it: Let users try scheduled delivery and dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing invoices
